title: LabOS: Intelligent Laboratory Operating System
summary: A research toolchain and laboratory platform for experiment workflows, asset tracking, knowledge management, and AI-assisted scientific discovery.

title: AI-Assisted Electrochemical Research Platform
summary: Exploring the integration of machine learning, multimodal research data, and electrochemical knowledge for intelligent electrolysis, green energy research, and AI4Science workflows.

title: SonicBalance: Auditory Feedback for Accessible Photography
summary: An accessibility-focused HCI project exploring auditory feedback mechanisms to support blind and low-vision users in photographic composition and balance.

title: AI and AIGC Teaching Toolchains
summary: Developed teaching materials, workflows, and practical modules for AI, AIGC, Python, computer vision, and data science education across undergraduate and interdisciplinary contexts.

title: XR Lab and VR/AR Design Practice
summary: Designed and delivered XR/AR teaching, prototyping, and student innovation projects around Unity, C#, spatial computing, and immersive interaction design.

title: 3D LiDAR Visualisation and Interaction
summary: Worked on 3D LiDAR data visualisation and interactive system development during my time at the Energy Research Institute @ NTU.
